source_file: Economic Watch_ China enhances social credit system to boost high-quality development-Xinhua.txt
text:
China will support domestic credit service institutions in establishing independent and impartial third-
                                party credit service partnerships with Belt and Road Initiative partner countries and BRICS nations,
                                and will also promote the internationalization of domestic credit rating agencies, according to the
                                guideline.

Looking ahead, Li said China will increase efforts in data governance, facilitate the flow of data,
                                effectively cultivate the credit market, and expand the credit economy. ■
